title: Machine Learning Potentials
description: Neural network models that learn potential energy surfaces directly from quantum-mechanical data, enabling molecular dynamics at near-DFT accuracy and a fraction of the cost.

title: Quantum Chemistry
description: High-level electronic structure methods — from DFT to coupled-cluster theory — used to generate reference data and benchmark machine-learned models.

title: AI Agents for Science
description: Intelligent assistants that plan, execute, and interpret computational chemistry workflows, lowering the barrier between a research question and a converged calculation.

title: Molecular Discovery
description: Coupling generative and predictive AI with simulation to accelerate the design of new molecules and materials, from conformer search to reaction pathway exploration.
